title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
